title: hibbertia ancistrotricha
intro: Hibbertia ancistrotricha, also known as a yellow daisy bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to the eastern regions of Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and alkaloids which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating skin irritations. Hibbertia ancistrotricha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
